_comment: Pa11y base configuration. Committed to the project root.
CI generates pa11y.ci.json from this file (adding chromeLaunchConfig.executablePath)
using the accessibility workflow; do not commit pa11y.ci.json.
The chromeLaunchConfig.args entry disables the sandbox for CI runners
that restrict unprivileged user namespaces (GitHub-hosted Ubuntu 24.04).
Ignore entries record known deferred AAA findings; each entry must
have a matching note in docs/accessibility.md.
Remove an entry when the corresponding finding is fixed.
Do not add new codes here without a matching entry in docs/accessibility.md.
